See the * [FAQ in the README](README.md#problems-with-invalid-numbers] on how to make * metadata changes. * * Do not modify this file directly! */ return [ 689404 => 'Îles du Vent(IDV)', 689405 => 'Îles du Vent(IDV)', 689406 => 'Îles Sous-le-vent(ISLV)', 689408 => 'Îles du Vent(IDV)', 6894088 => 'Polynesia', 689409 => 'Remote Archipelago', 689494 => 'Polynesia', 689495 => 'Polynesia', 689496 => 'Polynesia', 689498 => 'Polynesia', ];
